name: worktree
summary: Create, inspect, branch, push, and remove git worktrees safely.
description: A git-worktree helper that wraps common actions (create/list/status/branch/health/push/remove/switch) behind a single 'tr' command. Enforces a users/<alias>/<name> branch convention, repairs detached HEADs, and guards destructive/remote actions with typed confirmation.
